q: How long do the cookies stay fresh?
a: Five days at room temp in the sealed bag they arrive in. Two weeks refrigerated. Three months frozen — just reheat at 160°C for 5 minutes and they're 90% as good as fresh. Reheat instructions come in every box.
Currently we ship within the US and Canada. International shipping is in the works — customs forms for cookies are surprisingly complicated. Join the newsletter for updates.

q: Can I customize a gift box?
a: Absolutely. After you place an order, reply to your confirmation email with any preferences — extra chocolate, no nuts, all one flavor — and we'll make it work. Or use the Build Your Box tool to hand-pick every cookie.

q: What if my cookies arrive damaged?
a: They shouldn't — we pack each cookie in its own sleeve inside a crush-proof box. But if anything goes wrong, email us with a photo and we'll rush a replacement. No questions asked.

q: Do you do corporate orders or events?
a: We do. Orders of 50+ cookies get custom packaging with your logo. Lead time is one week. Email us directly and we'll sort out the details.
